/usr/bin/ar qc libsnn_c.a CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/libs/log/csv.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/libs/log/logger.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/libs/mnist/mnist.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/libs/network/data.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/libs/network/process.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/libs/network/render.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/libs/network/thread.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/libs/network/utils.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/libs/senses/encode.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/libs/senses/eye.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/libs/senses/input.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/src/foo.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/src/mnist.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/src/net.c.o CMakeFiles/snn_c.dir/src/test.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsnn_c.a
